task: Inspect current stream execution and schema touchpoints

task: Wire request record APIs and admin UI to new timing metrics
acceptance_criteria: Frontend types and admin views render new timing fields
notes: Admin list/detail/trace now render headers, first SSE event, first output, and total latency using the new timing semantics.
